embed.title: !maxbattle
embed.description: Alerts for Dynamax and Gigantamax raids at PokeStops / Power Spots.

fields.name: By level
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}maxbattle level:3` — level 3 dynamax raids
`{{prefix}}maxbattle level:4-5` — high-tier
`{{prefix}}maxbattle gmax` — Gigantamax only (alias for level:7)

fields.name: Move filter
fields.value: `move:mud_slap` — only if the boss has this move (underscores for multi-word names)

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`clean` — auto-delete when the battle ends
`edit` — single message edited in place
`ping`

fields.name: Remove
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}maxbattle remove charizard`
`{{prefix}}maxbattle remove level:3`
`{{prefix}}maxbattle remove everything`
`{{prefix}}untrack id:<N>`
